sentences.text: Hey Ryan, how are you doing?

you know, anything fun.

I did the exact same.
So that's awesome.

Yep.

Um If you had any additional needs, et cetera.

Yeah.

I mean, I know that some do better than some do better than others.

It's, it's fairly cheap.

We're just not, I think last quarter maybe we had two leases for all of our properties.
So like not something I would consider to be like fantastic for the for the value, but um I'm still willing to stick it out a little longer and see how things go.
I do think though that if it doesn't, you know, if we don't start seeing a few more leases than that, we at least for the ones that aren't getting leases, we might not continue on those.
Um Yeah, I think there's several complexes that haven't gotten a single lease from rentable.
So if there's, if there's ones that are getting leases, we'll probably keep those on.
But I, I haven't decided I'm just, I'm just thinking about the future, you know.
No, that makes sense.
Um

Is it?
